title: Human Bond Dynamics Constraint Engine
purpose: Defines how Human Bond Dynamics signals combine into higher-order relational assessments.

combination_rules.name: Instability Detection
combination_rules.logic: If FES-L03, FES-L04, and FES-L08 co-occur, output stability_level = unstable and relational_volatility = high.

combination_rules.name: Strong Bond Formation
combination_rules.logic: If FES-L01, FES-L02, and FES-L06 co-occur, output bond_strength = high.

combination_rules.name: Volatility Loop
combination_rules.logic: If FES-L04, FES-L05, and FES-L08 co-occur, output cyclical_pattern = confirmed.

combination_rules.name: Attachment Risk
combination_rules.logic: If FES-L06 and FES-L07 co-occur, output dependency_risk = elevated.

combination_rules.name: Trust Fragility
combination_rules.logic: If FES-L03 and FES-L09 co-occur, output trust_structure = fragile.

combination_rules.name: Jealousy Lockdown Escalation
combination_rules.logic: If FES-L10 co-occurs with FES-L04 or FES-L08, output emotional_access = restricted and instability_pressure = elevated.
